quality.rationale: 多步张量乘积求导结合自由场麦克斯韦方程与反对称性抵消，逻辑链条完整且可推广至弯曲时空协变导数形式

origin.question: Problem 4.15. Show that the stress-energy tensor for the electromagnetic field is divergenceless (i.e. $\mathbf{T}^{\mu \nu}_{,\nu} = 0$ ) in the absence of charge sources.
origin.solution:
Solution 4.15. The form of the electromagnetic stress-energy is given in the introduction. Taking its divergence we have:\n$$\n\begin{array}{l} 4 \pi \mathrm {T}^{\mu \nu} ,_{\nu} = \mathrm {F}^{\mu a} ,_{\nu} \mathrm {F}^{\nu}_{a} + \mathrm {F}^{\mu a} \mathrm {F}^{\nu}_{a , \nu} - \frac {1}{2} \mathrm {F}_{a} \beta \mathrm {F}^{\alpha \beta , \mu} \\\\ = \mathrm {F}^{\mu a} \mathrm {F}_{\alpha , \nu}^{\nu} + \mathrm {F}_{\nu a} \left(\mathrm {F}^{\mu a , \nu} - \frac {1}{2} \mathrm {F}^{\nu a , \mu}\right) \\\\ = \mathrm {F}^{\mu \alpha} \mathrm {F}_{\alpha , \nu}^{\nu} + \frac {1}{2} \mathrm {F}_{\nu \alpha} \left(\mathrm {F}^{\alpha \nu , \mu} + \mathrm {F}^{\mu \alpha , \nu} + \mathrm {F}^{\nu \mu , \alpha}\right). \\\\ \end{array}\n$$\nAccording to the free field Maxwell equations, both $\mathbf{F}^{
u}_{\alpha,
u}$ and the terms in parentheses vanish, hence $\mathbf{T}^{\mu
u}_{,
u} = 0$ . Note: If a charge current $\mathbf{J}$ is present this result is modified to $\mathbf{T}^{\mu
u}_{,
u} = -\mathbf{F}^{\mu\alpha}\mathbf{J}_{\alpha}$ , as is easily verified.
